title: 8 Stocks' Monster Profit Growth Can't Be Contained
text: Profits are down at S&P 500 companies at large. But a few are putting up monster profit gains that seem to have no bounds.

title: Globe Life Inc. (GL) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Stephen Mota - Senior Director, Customer Relations Frank Svoboda - Co-Chief Executive Officer Matt Darden - Co-Chief Executive Officer Tom Kalmbach - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Jimmy Bhullar - JPMorgan Wes Carmichael - Wells Fargo John Barnidge - Piper Sandler Erik Bass - Autonomous Research Ryan Krueger - KBW Andrew Kligerman - Credit Suisse Wilma Burdis - Raymond James Operator Hello and welcome to Globe Life's First [ph] Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. My name is Melissa and I will be your coordinator for today's event.

title: Globe Life (GL) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Globe Life's (GL) first-quarter results reflect higher premiums, increased net investment income and improved insurance underwriting income. Higher expenses act as offsets.

title: Globe Life (GL) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Globe Life (GL) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.
